title: Studio Bowl Collection
description: Hand-thrown bowls in a range of sizes with signature spiral centers and variegated teal, speckled, and earth-tone glazes. Great for everyday use or display.

title: Teal Spiral Bowl
description: A large hand-thrown bowl with a deep teal glaze and textured, dotted rim. The spiral center and rich color make this a showpiece for any table.

title: Ocean Collection
description: Sea-inspired pieces including plates, small dishes, turtle and starfish forms — all in a soft ocean-blue glaze with textured stamped surfaces.

title: Green Fish Platter
description: A hand-built oval platter with carved fish relief and rich forest-green glaze. A one-of-a-kind statement piece for the kitchen or wall.

title: Leaf Trinket Dish
description: A hand-textured leaf dish pressed from a real leaf and glazed in deep forest green with copper highlights. Perfect for jewelry or on a coffee table.

title: Three-Bowl Set
description: A coordinated set of three hand-thrown bowls in complementary glazes — forest green, speckled grey, and soft white. Sold together.

title: Gold Geometric Dishes
description: A set of hand-built geometric slab dishes in square, triangular, and oval forms with metallic gold glaze. Modern and bold.

title: Green Gourd Vessels
description: Hand-thrown gourd-shaped vessels with carved wave details and a two-tone green glaze. Decorative and sculptural.

title: Holiday Ornament Set
description: Hand-stamped clay ornaments in seasonal shapes — snowflakes, trees, stars, and Washington State outlines. Each set is unique.

title: Camper Ornaments
description: Cheerful hand-painted vintage camper ornaments in red, orange, and yellow. A fun and whimsical gift.
